# Anthropic Skill

This is a skill written in the standard Anthropic SKILL.md format.
It only uses the `name` and `description` fields in the frontmatter,
with a free-form markdown body.

The parser should handle this as a valid skill with Ok status.

## Usage

Just use it as-is. No structured parameters needed.
